subject: Re: Kevin D'Amourrestrictions should disappear on transfer
body:
, or end of developmnet
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Spoke to Kevin D'Amour.
>  
> Kevin promised to e-mail to me right away a copy of
> the legal description  
> (metes and bounds) of the property proposed for
> purchase by "me" and to  forward 
> as soon as Kevin could get his hands on it a copy of
> the OLG  numbered survey 
> indicating the 15 parcels, which Kevin says occurred
> as a result  of 
> subdividing each of the 5 separate parcels into 3
> parcels.
>  
> Kevin said that he understood that open ended active
> support obligation in  
> the face of a $500,000 initial, plus $500,000 per
> month default clause is  
> extreme and would speak to Kjaer about it.
>  
> Kevin said he would also discuss with Kjaer a more
> limited right to start  
> permitting the dock and at least one structure right
> away.  However, Kevin  did 
> not sound optimistic.  Kevin did say that Kevin,
> himself has no  objection, 
> but . . .
>  
> Kevin then had to get off the phone, but said that
> he would get back to me  
> after speaking to Kjaer.
>  
> Darren
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
, or end of developmnet
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Spoke to Kevin D'Amour.

Kevin promised to e-mail to me right away a copy of
the legal description
(metes and bounds) of the property proposed for
purchase by "me" and to forward
as soon as Kevin could get his hands on it a copy of
the OLG numbered survey
indicating the 15 parcels, which Kevin says occurred
as a result of
subdividing each of the 5 separate parcels into 3
parcels.

Kevin said that he understood that open ended active
support obligation in
the face of a $500,000 initial, plus $500,000 per
month default clause is
extreme and would speak to Kjaer about it.

Kevin said he would also discuss with Kjaer a more
limited right to start
permitting the dock and at least one structure right
away. However, Kevin did
not sound optimistic. Kevin did say that Kevin,
himself has no objection,
but . . .

Kevin then had to get off the phone, but said that
he would get back to me
after speaking to Kjaer.

Darren
